debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

failed_attempts:
apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intro i _
          exact div_nonneg (by positivity) (by norm_num)
        · intro i hi
          have : nth Nat.Prime i ≥ i + 1 := by
            apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
            apply Nat.lt_nthPrime
            simp_all
          exact (div_le_div_iff (by nlinarith) (by nlinarith)).mpr (by nlinarith)

apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intro i _
          exact div_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity)
        · intro i hi
          have : nth Nat.Prime i ≥ i + 1 := by
            apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
            exact Nat.Prime.nth_pos i
          exact by
            gcongr
            all_goals linarith

apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intro i _
          exact div_nonneg (by positivity) (by linarith [Nat.Prime.one_lt (nth_prime i)])
        · intro i hi
          have : nth Nat.Prime i ≥ i + 1 := by
            apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
            exact nth_prime_strict_mono (by aesop)
          exact (div_le_div_iff (by linarith [Nat.Prime.pos (nth_prime i)]) (by linarith)).mpr
            (by nlinarith)

apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intro i _
          exact div_nonneg (by positivity) (by nlinarith [Nat.Prime.two_le (nth Nat.Prime i)])
        · intro i hi
          have : nth Nat.Prime i ≥ i + 1 := by
            apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
            apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self i))
            apply nth_strict_mono
            exact Nat.Prime.one_lt (nth Nat.Prime i)
          exact (div_le_div_iff (by nlinarith [Nat.Prime.two_le (nth Nat.Prime i)]) (by nlinarith)).mpr
            (by nlinarith)
